title: wolfhsm-sys: C shims (shims.c)
description: Write wolfhsm-sys/src/shims.c with C shim functions for every algorithm whose key struct is zero-sized in the generated bindings (stack-allocate key struct in C, set key ID, perform operation, free). Shims needed: wolfhsm_ecc_sign, wolfhsm_ecc_verify, wolfhsm_ecc_export_public_der, wolfhsm_ecc_shared_secret, wolfhsm_ecc_make_key; wolfhsm_curve25519_make_key, wolfhsm_curve25519_shared_secret; wolfhsm_rsa_sign, wolfhsm_rsa_verify, wolfhsm_rsa_make_key; wolfhsm_mldsa_sign, wolfhsm_mldsa_verify, wolfhsm_mldsa_make_key; wolfhsm_aes_gcm_encrypt, wolfhsm_aes_gcm_decrypt; wolfhsm_sha256 (one-shot); wolfhsm_cmac. Ed25519 does NOT need a shim (ed25519_key is 256 bytes, sized in wolfcrypt-rs).
